faq.question: Can I add training center branches?
faq.answer: Yes. Specify addresses and contacts for all branches — information is displayed on the landing page for student convenience.

faq.question: Is the landing page suitable for business trainings?
faq.answer: Yes. Describe the format (corporate/open training), training topics, and target audience — AI adapts the presentation.

faq.question: Can I add graduate reviews?
faq.answer: Yes. A reviews section increases trust and conversion. Add screenshots, videos, or text reviews.

faq.question: How will students enroll in courses?
faq.answer: The enrollment form on the landing page collects applications with student contacts — you receive them and reach out to enroll in the course.

faq.question: What is Promto?
faq.answer: Promto is an AI website builder. You describe your business, and the system creates a ready landing page in minutes without code.

faq.question: How much does a training center landing page cost?
faq.answer: You can create a basic landing page for free. Paid plans unlock custom domain and extended features.
